justification: The diff correctly migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter), updating annotations (@Before -> @BeforeEach, @Test(expected=...) -> assertThrows(...)) and imports. It also modernizes string formatting using String.formatted() and adds @Serial annotations to serialVersionUID fields. The pom.xml is updated to Java 21 and uses the <release> flag. However, the diff includes binary .class files in the target directory, which is generally bad practice for version control and adds spurious churn, lowering the diff_coherence score.
